rules.text: When the denial letter states an appeal deadline, repeat that deadline explicitly in the appeal and request timely review.
Request the claim file and the specific clinical criteria applied, in writing, when the denial cites guidelines without enough detail to rebut.
Keep tone factual and person-centered. This is draft assistance only — not legal or medical advice.
Do not cite guidelines from an insurer other than the one that issued the denial. Rely solely on the denying insurer's own clinical policies or general standards of care.
ASAM 4th edition criteria support medically managed inpatient withdrawal for patients with high CIWA-Ar scores and prior complicated withdrawal, which supersedes older insurer policies.
State substance-use-disorder parity mandates for fully-insured plans require withdrawal-management benefits at parity with medical care, preempting standard plan exclusions.
